Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: 1. Analyze the Request: Input: A Python dictionary representing a DECLARE model for a loan application process. It includes various constraints with support confidence values all 1.0. Task: Analyze the model. Discuss how activities and constraints shape a real-life scenario.

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: 2. Deconstruct the DECLARE Model: Existence: Receive Application Gather Additional Documents. Absence: Proceed Without Compliance. Exactly One: Preliminary Credit Check. Init: Receive Application. Response: Receive Application to Preliminary Credit Check. Succession: Preliminary Credit Check to Gather Additional Documents.

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Activities: Map A-H to the standard loan workflow. A: Intake. B: Risk Assessment. C: Due Diligence. D: Offer Creation. E: Compliance Check. F: Final Approval. G: Execution. H: Communication.

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: 3. Structure the Response: Introduction: Acknowledge the model. Phase 1: The Lifecycle Flow. Phase 2: Constraint Analysis. Phase 3: Business and Regulatory Drivers. Conclusion: Summary.

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Specific Constraint Interpretation: coexistence: Gather Additional Documents with Authorize Contract Terms implies cannot authorize terms unless docs gathered. noncoexistence: Transfer Funds and Receive Application ensures funds not sent before process starts.

Name: Validation - PE
Text: 5. Refining the Analysis Self-Correction Nuance: Critique of the Model: Some constraints look noisy or highly specific. Tone Check: Ensure explain the implication. 7. Final Review against Prompt: Analyze model Yes. Discuss Yes.

Name: Counterfactual Reasoning - IND
Text: Self-Correction during drafting: noticed succession links Preliminary Credit Check to Gather Additional Documents. In reality sometimes docs are gathered before the check. However in this model the check triggers the gathering.

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Another Check: nonchainsuccession links Authorize Contract Terms to Notify Customer. altresponse: Transfer Funds to Notify Customer. Focus on positive constraints as they define the flow.
